title: The Boy and the Heron
originalTitle: 君たちはどう生きるか
posterAlt: The Boy and the Heron (2023) movie poster
tmdbOverview: While the Second World War rages, the teenage Mahito, haunted by his mother's tragic death, is relocated from Tokyo to the serene rural home of his new stepmother Natsuko, a woman who bears a striking resemblance to the boy's mother.  As he tries to adjust, this strange new world grows even stranger following the appearance of a persistent gray heron, who perplexes and bedevils Mahito, dubbing him the "long-awaited one."
synopsis: The Boy and the Heron (2023) is a animation, fantasy and drama film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
